hi: Hey there! 👋 How can I help you today?

what courses do you offer: We offer courses in AI, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, Computer Vision, Data Science, and Reinforcement Learning.
which course should i start with: If you’re a beginner, start with Introduction to AI (4 weeks). It builds a strong foundation before moving to Machine Learning or Deep Learning.
how long is the deep learning course: The Deep Learning course runs for 8 weeks and includes hands-on projects using TensorFlow and PyTorch.
how do i enroll: Go to the Courses page and click 'Enroll Now'. Follow the registration steps to get started.
do you provide certificates: Yes! 🎓 Each student gets a verified digital certificate after completing a course and passing the final test.
are the courses beginner friendly: Absolutely! All our courses start with basics and gradually move to advanced topics.
what are the prerequisites for machine l: You should know basic Python and high school math (algebra, probability, and statistics).
do you offer live sessions: Yes! We host weekly live Q&A and mentorship sessions with AI professionals.
is there any free trial: Yes, new learners get a 7-day free trial to explore lessons and exercises.
can i learn at my own pace: Of course! All lessons are self-paced, so you can learn whenever you want.
what tools or software are required: You'll need Python (Anaconda or Google Colab), Jupyter Notebook, and a stable internet connection.
do you provide placement assistance: Yes! We offer placement help, career guidance, and mock interviews for top performers.
can i get doubt support: Yes! Instructors and mentors are available via discussion forums and live chat.
what is the refund policy: We offer a 100% refund if you cancel within 7 days of enrollment. 💰
are there any group discounts: Yes! We offer discounts for groups, schools, and corporate batches. Contact us to know more.
do you have ai projects: Yes! Every course includes real-world projects like chatbots, image classification, and sentiment analysis.
can i access courses on mobile: Yes, our platform is mobile-friendly 📱. You can learn anytime on your phone or tablet.
how much do the courses cost: Prices vary by course. Most beginner courses start around ₹4999 or $59.
what payment methods do you accept: We accept debit/credit cards, UPI, PayPal, and net banking.
do i need prior coding experience: Not necessarily! Our Introduction to AI course teaches coding from scratch.
can i pause or resume my course: Yes! You can pause your progress anytime and resume where you left off.
do you update your content: Yes! We regularly update all lessons to stay aligned with the latest AI trends.
can i download course materials: Yes, you can download notes, slides, and Jupyter notebooks for offline study.
what happens after i finish a course: After completion, you’ll get your certificate and access to our alumni network for opportunities and updates.
do you offer internship opportunities: Yes, top-performing students are shortlisted for AI research internships and company projects.
can i retake quizzes: Yes! You can retry quizzes as many times as you like to improve your score.
how can i contact support: You can reach our support team via email (support@ailearning.com) or use the live chat on the website.
what is ai: AI, or Artificial Intelligence, is the simulation of human intelligence in machines that can think and learn.
what is machine learning: Machine Learning is a subset of AI that allows computers to learn from data and make predictions or decisions without being explicitly programmed.
what is deep learning: Deep Learning is a type of Machine Learning that uses multi-layered neural networks to process complex data like images, audio, and text.
